title: memory_dff: walk through more than one mux for computing read enable

features.name: memory read enable through cascaded muxes
features.description: Code should include a memory inference with read enable logic that traverses multiple cascaded mux cells before reaching the memory read port
features.snippet:
reg [7:0] bram[0:255];
always @(*) rdata = re ? bram[addr] : 8'b0;
